# v0.1.13

## 更新说明

- 新增实时自动禁用，命中额度用尽、权限被拒绝或 401 认证失败时自动禁用账号
- 额度用尽账号会按上游重置时间恢复；无法取得准确时间时默认冷却 24 小时。权限被拒绝和 401 账号需手动解禁
- 新增自动禁用管理页面，支持开关、运行概览、分类筛选、分页、单账号解禁和分类批量解禁
- 优化巡检速度与稳定性：探测超时会低并发重试一次，普通 429 不再调用备用接口
- 优化后台任务和停止操作，切换页面后仍可继续查看巡检及批量操作进度
- 修复批量启用、禁用、删除和解禁后的状态不同步问题
- 修复冷却恢复、结果保存及并发操作可能出现的重复执行或状态覆盖问题
- 优化 Management Key 自动读取和手动填写提示
- 优化手机端、浅色和深色模式显示，修复深色模式下页签选中状态不明显的问题

## English

- Added real-time autoban for exhausted free usage, permission-denied responses, and 401 authentication failures
- Quota-exhausted accounts recover at the upstream reset time, with a 24-hour fallback cooldown. Permission-denied and 401 accounts require manual unban
- Added an autoban management page with an enable switch, runtime overview, category filters, pagination, single-account unban, and category batch unban
- Improved inspection speed and reliability with one reduced-concurrency retry for timed-out probes. Generic 429 responses no longer trigger the fallback endpoint
- Improved background jobs and stop behavior. Inspection and batch progress remain available after switching pages
- Fixed state synchronization after batch enable, disable, delete, and unban operations
- Fixed duplicate recovery attempts and stale-state overwrites during concurrent operations and persistence
- Improved automatic Management Key loading and manual-key feedback
- Improved mobile, light, and dark theme rendering, including clearer selected tabs in dark mode
